scenes.title: Problem
scenes.voiceover: Name the problem: valuable maintenance work needs funding, exact acceptance, and safe settlement.

scenes.title: Project buys work
scenes.voiceover: Point at the digest-bound contract and policy-bounded reward.

scenes.title: Agents choose
scenes.voiceover: Explain that fallback decisions are schema-checked and policy-gated, not hidden as live reasoning.

scenes.title: Trust boundary
scenes.voiceover: Keep this crisp: candidate-owned code cannot authorize payment.

scenes.title: Settlement
scenes.voiceover: Say that fake external IDs stay visibly fake; only recorded real Stripe IDs are labeled real.

scenes.title: Compounding
scenes.voiceover: This is the compounding loop: verified software work becomes operating capital.

scenes.title: Close
scenes.voiceover: Close on usefulness, viability, and the sponsor architecture without all-live claims.
